subject: A serene curving coastline viewed from an elevated cliff vantage, with a long sandy beach sweeping along a calm bay and rocky outcroppings rising from the shallow surf
description: A panoramic coastal landscape painted from an elevated cliffside perspective. A long crescent of pale sand sweeps from the lower-right foreground around a calm turquoise bay toward distant headlands at upper left. Dark volcanic-looking rocks pierce the shallow surf in the mid-ground, casting long shadows on the wet sand as gentle waves lap inward. Rolling green coastal hills frame the bay on the far side, fading into a hazy horizon. The sky is a soft warm gradient of pale gold and peach near the horizon, deepening to muted blue above, suggesting late afternoon or early evening light. No figures are present — the scene is pure landscape, tranquil and unpopulated.
foreground: Cliffside vantage with sandy beach curving into the frame and dark wet rocks dotting the shallow surf
background: Distant green coastal headlands fading into a hazy gold-and-blue sky over a calm bay
